'''Lojrak Shrag''' was a [[Salt/Legends|salt]]-[[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Arcona/Legends|Arcona]] criminal who lived on [[Cona/Legends|Cona]] before the outbreak of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. [[Godiban Bakoosta]] was his lieutenant. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Shrag was arrested by [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Tassida Judrelle]], [[Quarmall]], and [[Stass Allie/Legends|Stass Allie]] prior to the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]].
